questions.text: Blood is carried away from the heart by:
questions.explanation: Arteries carry oxygenated blood away from the heart to body parts. Veins carry deoxygenated blood back to the heart.
Xylem is the vascular tissue that transports water and minerals from roots to other parts of the plant.

questions.text: What is the function of RBC?
questions.correctAnswer: Red Blood Cells carry oxygen from lungs to body tissues.
questions.explanation: RBCs contain hemoglobin which binds with oxygen and transports it to all body cells.

questions.text: The liquid part of blood is called ________.
questions.explanation: Plasma is the liquid component of blood that carries blood cells, nutrients, and waste products.
